Rendering la
Documentation
  • Overview

  • Tooling

?.

Null-safe member, index, and call access.

Syntax: ?. | ?[] | ?()

Category

optional-chain

Related

  • [?.](/corpus/?..html)
  • [?[](/corpus/?[.html)
  • [?(](/corpus/?(.html)
  • [vel](/corpus/vel.html)
  • [sponte](/corpus/sponte.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/operatores/optional-chain.fab (canonical · operator-group)

Null-safe member, index, and call access.

# operatores/optional-chain — ?. ?[ ?(
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   optionalSuffix :← '?.' IDENTIFIER | '?[' expr ']' | '?(' argumentList ')'
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   Roma, Italia, nihil, nihil, a, nihil
#
# BACKEND:
#   Cross-ref optionalis/optionalis.fab for genus-heavy tour.
#   Optional call ?( — syntax in frontmatter; Rust e2e defers to driver optional-chain tests.

genus Locus {
    textus urbs
    textus regio sponte
}

genus Civis {
    textus nomen
    Locus locus sponte
}

incipit {
    fixum _ aelia ← Civis {
        nomen = "Aelia",
        locus = Locus { urbs = "Roma", regio = "Italia" }
    }

    nota aelia?.locus?.urbs
    nota aelia?.locus?.regio

    fixum _ brutus ← Civis { nomen = "Brutus" }
    nota brutus?.locus?.urbs
    nota brutus?.locus?.regio

    fixum _ litterae ← ["a", "b", "c"]
    nota litterae?[0]
    nota litterae?[10]
}

Expected output:

Roma
Italia
nihil
nihil
a
nihil
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/operatores/optional-chain.fab"]
